channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-04-17
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ESMA launches a call for evidence on restricted subscription and private credit ratings 16/04/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: ​The EBA launches the recruitment of its Executive Director​
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) has today launched an open selection procedure to recruit its new Executive Director. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; information très récente.

item.title: Insurance protection gaps in a changing climate
item.description: Speech delivered by Petra Hielkema, EIOPA Chairperson, at the conference on Climate Risk in Insurance organised by the National Bank of Slovakia (NBS), the OECD and the International Sustainable Finance Centre — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (eiopa media) ; impact assurance.

item.title: The EBA seeks feedback on 4.3 draft technical package of its reporting framework
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published a draft technical package for version 4.3 of its reporting framework, covering anti-money laundering (AML) and third country branches (TCB) reporting. This early release is intended to support reporting entities in preparing for upcoming changes ahead of the final publication, scheduled for June 2026. The EBA The EBA invites stakeholders to provide feedback on both the draft technical package and the accompanying glossary. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; information très récente.

item.title: The EBA observes an increase of high earners in the EU in 2024
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published its 2024 Dashboard on high earners. The data shows an increase in the number of individuals in EU banks earning more than EUR 1 million. The Report also confirms that gender imbalance persists, with high‐paid positions still predominantly held by men in both credit institutions and investment firms. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; information très récente.

item.title: EIOPA’s year-end 2024 study on market and credit risk confirms the need for continued supervisory attention over dispersion identified
item.description: EIOPA published today the results of its comparative study on the modelling of market and credit risk in internal models based on year-end 2024 data. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (eiopa media) ; impact marché.

item.title: Meeting of 18-19 March 2026
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european central bank) ; information très récente.

item.title: Des valises remplies de billets, des réseaux d'escrocs, des convergences avec le narcotrafic... La fraude à l'Assurance maladie "s'industrialise", avec les méthodes du crime organisé - BFM
